category.scope_note: LED luminaire and light source compliance comparison for Chinese manufacturers exporting to the Chilean market (SEC mandatory certification, NCh/IEC standards, Ministry of Energy efficiency labelling, SUBTEL).

title.en: China-to-Chile LED Luminaire Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国 LED 灯具进入智利：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國 LED 燈具進入智利：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China LED luminaire documentation against Chilean SEC (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles) mandatory certification, INN NCh / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 safety standards, Ministry of Energy efficiency labelling, and SUBTEL radio approval for smart luminaires, versus Chinese GB standards and CCC certification.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国 LED 灯具文件与智利 SEC（电力与燃料监管局）强制认证、INN NCh / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 安全标准、能源部能效标签及面向智能灯具的 SUBTEL 无线电核准要求差距对照，与中国 GB 标准及 CCC 认证对比。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國 LED 燈具文件與智利 SEC（電力與燃料監管局）強制認證、INN NCh / IEC 60598 / 62560 / 62471 安全標準、能源部能效標籤及面向智能燈具的 SUBTEL 無線電核准要求差距對照，與中國 GB 標準及 CCC 認證對比。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-certifier assessment, product safety determination, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Chilean SEC certification protocols, NCh/IEC standard references, Ministry of Energy efficiency labelling requirements, and SUBTEL radio obligations with qualified professionals and SEC-authorized certifiers before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可认证机构评审、产品安全认定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士及 SEC 授权认证机构核验现行智利 SEC 认证规程、NCh/IEC 标准引用、能源部能效标签要求及 SUBTEL 无线电义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可認證機構評審、產品安全認定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士及 SEC 授權認證機構核驗現行智利 SEC 認證規程、NCh/IEC 標準引用、能源部能效標籤要求及 SUBTEL 無線電義務。

answer_first.en: A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer exporting to Chile must obtain SEC (Superintendencia de Electricidad y Combustibles) mandatory product certification and the SEC seal through an SEC-authorized certification body before the product can be marketed or sold; demonstrate electrical safety against NCh/IEC 60598 (luminaires) and IEC 62560 (self-ballasted LED lamps) adopted as Chilean NCh standards by INN; comply with the Ministry of Energy energy efficiency labelling regime for lighting (etiqueta de eficiencia energetica) where the product class is in scope; and obtain SUBTEL (Subsecretaria de Telecomunicaciones) equipment approval for any luminaire with wireless functionality (Wi-Fi / Bluetooth / Zigbee). Chile operates on a 220 V, 50 Hz single-phase domestic grid (same 50 Hz frequency as China; similar 220 V single-phase nominal, whereas China three-phase is 380 V). Chile has no horizontal RoHS-style substance-restriction regime and no REACH-style supply-chain notification duty, so EU-style substance documentation has no direct Chilean legal counterpart — none of these Chilean obligations are satisfied by existing Chinese CCC certification or GB test reports.
answer_first.zh: 向智利出口的中国 LED 灯具制造商须：在产品可被销售前，通过 SEC 授权认证机构取得 SEC（电力与燃料监管局）强制性产品认证及 SEC 认证标志；依据由 INN 采纳为智利 NCh 标准的 NCh/IEC 60598（灯具）及 IEC 62560（自镇流 LED 灯）证明电气安全；在产品类别属适用范围时，符合能源部针对照明产品的能效标签制度（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica）；并就具备无线功能（Wi-Fi / 蓝牙 / Zigbee）的灯具取得 SUBTEL（电信次级部）设备核准。智利采用 220 V、50 Hz 单相居民电网（频率 50 Hz 与中国相同；单相 220 V 标称值相近，而中国三相为 380 V）。智利没有 RoHS 式横向物质限制制度，也没有 REACH 式供应链通报义务，因此欧盟式物质文件在智利无直接法律对应——上述智利义务均不被现有中国 CCC 认证或 GB 检测报告所满足。
answer_first.zht: 向智利出口的中國 LED 燈具製造商須：在產品可被銷售前，通過 SEC 授權認證機構取得 SEC（電力與燃料監管局）強制性產品認證及 SEC 認證標誌；依據由 INN 採納為智利 NCh 標準的 NCh/IEC 60598（燈具）及 IEC 62560（自鎮流 LED 燈）證明電氣安全；在產品類別屬適用範圍時，符合能源部針對照明產品的能效標籤制度（etiqueta de eficiencia energetica）；並就具備無線功能（Wi-Fi / 藍牙 / Zigbee）的燈具取得 SUBTEL（電信次級部）設備核准。智利採用 220 V、50 Hz 單相居民電網（頻率 50 Hz 與中國相同；單相 220 V 標稱值相近，而中國三相為 380 V）。智利沒有 RoHS 式橫向物質限制制度，也沒有 REACH 式供應鏈通報義務，因此歐盟式物質文件在智利無直接法律對應——上述智利義務均不被現有中國 CCC 認證或 GB 檢測報告所滿足。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Re-verify each cycle against current SEC certification protocols, INN-adopted NCh/IEC standard editions, Ministry of Energy efficiency labelling scope, and SUBTEL equipment approval rules.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. SEC mandatory-certification product lists and Ministry of Energy labelling scope must be re-checked against current Chilean regulation on each review cycle.
